name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday, installment, and title loans up to $25,000 online or in-store, with same-day funding and bilingual service available.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized, fully accredited consumer lending company with a physical store presence across the United States, including this Jacksonville, FL location in the Commonwealth Village neighborhood of North Edgewood. The company has accumulated over 125,401 customer reviews averaging 4.9 out of 5 stars, with more than 200,000 reviews on Google, positioning it among the most reviewed short-term lenders in the country.

The Jacksonville store offers three core loan products. Payday Loans range from $100 to $500 and are structured as two-to-four-week short-term loans designed to bridge gaps between paychecks. Installment Loans range from $100 to $1,000, repaid in multiple scheduled payments over a longer term — offering more flexibility than payday products. Title Loans range from $2,000 to $25,000 and are offered in partnership with LoanCenter; borrowers use a paid-off, registered vehicle as collateral. The store also provides Western Union services and a referral rewards program. Applications can be submitted online, in-store, or by phone for pre-qualification.

What distinguishes this location is its bilingual capability — staff speak Spanish ('Hablamos español'), making it accessible to Spanish-speaking borrowers who may face language barriers at other lenders. Requirements to apply are straightforward: a government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and a Social Security Number or ITIN. The store is open six days a week (closed Sundays), with extended Friday and Saturday morning hours.

Advance America fills a real gap for consumers who need cash quickly and have limited access to traditional bank credit. However, the products come with the trade-offs common to the short-term lending industry: payday loans carry very high effective APRs due to their brief terms, installment loan maximums are capped at $1,000, and title loans put vehicle ownership at risk if repayments are missed. Borrowers in a genuine short-term pinch with a clear repayment plan may find these products useful; those seeking longer-term relief should explore alternatives first.
address: 10003 San Pablo Ave, El Cerrito, CA 94530

company_info.headquarters: 10003 San Pablo Ave, El Cerrito, CA 94530

pros: 4.9/5 star average across 125,401 verified customer reviews
Three loan types in one location: payday, installment, and title loans
Same-day funding on personal loans up to $1,000
Bilingual English/Spanish staff for Spanish-speaking borrowers
Online, in-store, and phone application options for flexibility
Pre-qualification available by phone before visiting
Western Union services available at the same location
cons: Payday loans max out at $500 with 2-4 week repayment — effective APR is typically very high
Title loans are offered through a third-party partner (LoanCenter), not directly by Advance America
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle with clear title — not an option for most borrowers
Store is closed Sundays; limited to in-person or digital channels during business hours only
Installment loans capped at $1,000 — insufficient for larger emergency expenses
best_for: Employed borrowers needing $100-$500 to cover expenses before their next paycheck
Borrowers needing up to $1,000 with a multi-payment repayment schedule
Vehicle owners with a paid-off car who need $2,000-$25,000 quickly
Spanish-speaking borrowers who prefer in-person service with bilingual staff
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for employed borrowers who need fast cash in amounts under $1,000 and have a definite repayment date in mind, or vehicle owners seeking larger secured loans through title lending. The main caveat is cost: payday loan terms are very short with fees that translate to high APRs, and title loans carry the risk of vehicle repossession — making these products appropriate only as a last resort or for borrowers confident in their ability to repay on schedule.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
